reviews.author: Lorenza Amato
reviews.text: Celena was very helpful, professional and thorough. She came to run diagnostics for my classic car and she made sure to check every nook and cranny while explaining everything in a comprehensive way. She has an eye for detail and knows her stuff.

reviews.author: Landie Thurmond
reviews.text: I had THE BEST experience with Tech On The Way. They were able to come to my house the day of to fix my headlights! They were so professional, worked in a timely manner, and got the job done! I'll be using only them in the future!

reviews.author: Lashon Hiley
reviews.text: Thank you so much to Celina once again. Prompt, Friendly and professional. I will always ask for her when I need my car serviced. And to have a female mechanic makes the experience sweeter. Thanks again Celina you rock.

reviews.author: Chelsea Williams
reviews.text: 10 out of 10 RECOMMEND! Tech on the way was super helpful and made things so much easier for me! I was so happy to know I didn't have to be bothered with the hassle of getting my car towed.

reviews.author: Andre Lumpkin
reviews.text: Top quality experience. Booking was quick and easy. Communication was clear and responsive. My mechanic was detailed, knowledgeable and thorough. Highly recommend!

reviews.author: Lora C
reviews.text: Had to get my 2007 Ford Escape up and running. Cerena came the same day. She had to chase some parts but everything was working within a few hours. Would definitely call them again when needed.

reviews.author: Curtis Lovett
reviews.text: Listen to anybody who's reading this. Tech On The Way is the best. My mechanic came through when I needed her. She was professional. She was on time and I appreciate her doing her job well.

reviews.author: Tave H.
reviews.text: Celena is a wonderful professional that responded within minutes by phone. She listened to me and was willing to go out of her way to assist. I thank God for a professional service like Tech On The Way Mobile!

reviews.author: Lelia's E.
reviews.text: Celena was an angel sent to me at a time of distress...let's talk about it. One of my fleet vans broke down at the gas station AFTER I had just picked it up from a mechanic for a different issue. I thought I only needed a battery jump, but turns out I needed a battery replacement as well as an alternator. Celena went above and beyond. Mind you, I had not called her. She just so happened to be at the gas station getting some things in between her service call. Celena made time for my issue, made sure that she diagnosed the issue to the fullest, repaired it, and ensures I was alright. I know this has nothing to do with service itself, but in 2025 when the world is so dark and heavy, I value a genuine spirit. Thank you so much Celena. I pray your business continues to flourish!

reviews.author: Victor O.
reviews.text: Very detailed and thorough in the diagnostic. Loved the emphasis on making sure everything was checked. Looking forward to an ongoing business relationship. Thank you so much for taking the time to share your experience and trusting Tech On The Way with your vehicle!

reviews.author: Talia R.
reviews.text: She's been the family mechanic for the last few years. She's repaired all type of things on all of our vehicles. She great and always available when needed. Affordable prices and very punctual. 10/10 would recommend

reviews.author: Myron ..
reviews.text: Celena is the first person that I will call from now on because she is dedicated to finishing the job. After I received an estimate, Celena came out to the site and provided a diagnosis. Yes, as some others have mentioned, she was not on time but what mechanical service is ever "on time"...mobile or stationary? Anyway, even after Celena realized the repair was more involved than anticipated, she made every effort to complete the job as efficiently as possible. I respect Celena's years of experience and commitment to get the job done.

reviews.author: Terese H.
reviews.text: This company was a life saver! My brakes started making loud noises. I contacted a different mobile mechanic who agreed to an appointment but later cancelled 30 mins later because of the rain. So I was stuck at an auto store and couldn't move my vehicle. Did a search and found Tech on the way. She was able to get to me within an hour and proceeded to work on my car while it was raining cats and dogs! She completed the job quickly and was also able to determine a problem that 5 other mechanics couldn't figure out. I highly recommend the company and as a female I felt like I could trust her. Pricing was fair and the tech was polite and professional!

reviews.author: Calista F.
reviews.text: Not only was it quick and simple to set up the appointment, but the mechanic was willing to use the car parts I purchased online. She kept me updated when she was on the way, and is very knowledgeable + professional. My car is finally tuned up and driving perfectly, I'm so thankful. If you're in Atlanta and looking for someone to work on your vehicle, don't even bother calling anyone else - Tech on the way is the best value and experience you will find.

reviews.author: Bob P.
reviews.text: I was unable to re install my fuel tank. Also had a fuel delivery problem. Celena showed up slightly late. Got right to work. Installed the tank in about 1 1/2 hours. Went straight to the fuel pump. Fixed the issue.

notes: Tech On The Way. Mobile mechanic service (car repair comes to you). Mableton GA. Phone (404) 926-6661. Female mechanic Celena/Celina/Cerena (name spelled inconsistently by reviewers — same person). Strong differentiator: female mechanic + mobile + same-day service.
